scripts.host:start: cross-env ROOMD_URL=http://localhost:8090 HOST_MODE=room npm run --workspace apps/host-web start
scripts.host:dev: cross-env ROOMD_URL=http://localhost:8090 HOST_MODE=room npm run --workspace apps/host-web dev
scripts.build: npm run --workspace services/roomd build && npm run --workspace apps/host-web build
